  "findings": [
    "Missing pipe guides near expansion loops",
    "Risk of pipe buckling or lateral deflection under thermal expansion",
    "Non-compliance with engineered piping support drawings"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate or safely depressurize the system if thermal movement is actively causing binding or buckling",
    "Install engineered pipe guides near the expansion loops in accordance with project support standards and MSS SP-58",
    "Inspect the piping and adjacent supports for signs of deformation, stress, or damage"
  ],
  "rationale": "Expansion loops require properly positioned guides to direct thermal expansion axially into the loop. Without these guides, the piping is highly susceptible to lateral buckling, misalignment, and premature failure under operating temperatures.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58",
    "Project support standards",
    "ASME B31.3"
  ]
}
